title: Model registration
description: A formal model a human registers in registry/models/, developed by a model-build agent and certified by the model gate. Symmetric to a pair registration.

id.description: model id, e.g. sail-riscv, sail-aarch64, wasmcert-wasm

language.description: the ISA/language this model gives semantics to (rv64, aarch64, wasm, evm, ebpf)

group.description: the semantics/<group> realization dir; defaults to id

kind.description: sail = vendor + emulator + machine-gen; external = wrap an upstream tool (KEVM, WasmCert, ...)

target_capabilities.description: capabilities the model claims to back; the model gate certifies the subset actually backed and that bounds referencing pairs

source.description: pinned upstream provenance; two version axes (ROADMAP MA5)

model_source.description: the vendored definition pin, or 'transcribed' when the proof_export reference is a transcription rather than byte-vendored source

emulator_release.description: the executable binary release the oracle shells to / the reference is cross-checked against

conformance_suite.description: how the oracle is validated against upstream

realizations.description: paths to the realization artifacts (emulator entry, btor2-machine dir, ...)
